initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  customer_demographics.cd_education_status, 
  date_dim.d_year, 
  SUM(store_sales.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
  store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
GROUP BY 
  customer_demographics.cd_education_status, 
  date_dim.d_year
ORDER BY 
  customer_demographics.cd_education_status ASC, 
  date_dim.d_year ASC
LIMIT 100
